statement.en: Quantitative imaging of mRNA-loaded lipid nanoparticles : from in-solution characterization to live-cell interactions toward applications in nanomedicine
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission is an embargoed thesis with abstract unavailable for evaluation. No substantive content exists in the public record to assess truth-value, factual claims, or theoretical propositions. Classification as ZERO (observation-impossible / context-dependent) is appropriate because the evaluable content is intentionally withheld.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: メッセージを包むナノスケールの幾何学が、細胞との対話を通じて時間とともに明かされていく。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 脂質の殻から遺伝子の光が放つ放射状の探索——分子の静寂と細胞の応答の邂逅。
